info.name: ⚡ ALdeci — VALIDATE
info.description:
## Validate — "Is it actually exploitable?"

Covers: MPTE Console, Attack Simulation, FAIL Engine, Playbooks, Reachability

### Personas Served
- **Jason Park** (Pentest Lead) — MPTE scanning, exploit verification
- **Raj Patel** (DevSecOps Lead) — FAIL scoring, validation triage
- **Carlos Mendez** (Red Team Lead) — Attack simulation campaigns
- **Lisa Wang** (Security Architect) — Attack path analysis

### Endpoints: 90+ covering MPTE, micro-pentest, attack simulation, FAIL engine, decisions, LLM consensus

### Vision Pillars: V3 (Decision Intelligence), V4 (Multi-LLM), V5 (MPTE Verification), V10 (CTEM)

item.name: 🔥 FAIL Engine (Differentiator #1)
item.description: Chaos engineering for AppSec — fault injection + response grading. No competitor has this.

item.name: 🎯 MPTE — Micro Penetration Testing Engine (Differentiator #6)
item.description: 19-phase deterministic scanner proving exploitability — the crown jewel. V5.

item.name: 🧪 Micro Pentest Engine
item.description: CVE-specific micro penetration tests — automated exploit verification.

item.name: ⚔️ Attack Simulation (BAS)
item.description: Breach & Attack Simulation — MITRE ATT&CK-mapped campaigns.
